caption: Just finished @chesapeake_acoustic Gerald's workshop at @dragonflymusiccenter and my right hand will never be the same. Best $40 I've spent. #fingerstyle #guitarlesson
Last night @chesapeake_acoustic delivered one of the most beautiful sets I've heard in Baltimore this year. Gerald's solo piece was the highlight. #baltimorelivemusic
Tip: if @chesapeake_acoustic is playing within 50 miles, drop everything and go. Consistently one of the best acoustic acts in the region. #midatlanticmusic #acoustic
Last night with @chesapeake_acoustic was one of the cleanest acoustic shows we've hosted. Packed room, zero PA issues, standing ovation. Hope to have them back.
Valentine's show with @chesapeake_acoustic was perfect. Gerald's Tommy Emmanuel cover had the whole room silent. That's the power of a single great guitar. ❤️
Holiday picks for Baltimore: @chesapeake_acoustic Christmas Eve gathering at the community center. Free, intimate, acoustic. Our top recommendation this season.
Derek's gathering last night — @chesapeake_acoustic played a 45-minute set and nobody left during the whole thing. The parlor guitar sound filled that room perfectly.
